package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for go_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_gogc_forced_low_without_measurement: Layer: Build and runtime configuration. Flag runtime/debug GC tuning in application code without benchmark notes.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
func scenario585Negative(items []string) int {
	started := time.Now()
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		if !started.IsZero() { total += len(item) }
	}
	return total
}
